settings_2fa_step2: 2. Tsiv noj npe 6-digit lus zais los ntawm app:

settings_2fa_active: ✅ 2FA txhawm tau. Koj account muaj kev tiv thaiv.
settings_2fa_disable_label: Mus rau disable, tsiv noj npe koj password:
settings_2fa_disable_hint: Txhawm tsis 2FA — yuav xav tau teeb tsa dua yog re-enabled
settings_api_key_placeholder: Tsiv noj npe koj API key...
settings_api_save_hint: Txuag AI key — encrypted nrog Fernet encryption
help_system_desc1: FastWrite yog ib feem hauv koj lub computer rau cov AI data extraction los ntawm cov ntaub ntawv (invoices, receipts, vouchers) nrog artificial intelligence (AI). Nws khiav ib txwm nyob rau koj lub computer — koj cov ntaub ntawv tsis muaj rau ib qho neeg, nrog rau platform administrator.
help_system_desc2: Nws ua li cas: Koj upload ib PDF nrog ib lossis ntau cov invoice. Lub system automatic na nrhiav ib txhua cov invoice, nrhiav cov supplier, sib xws cov cim, thiab extraction cov ntaub ntawv koj txhais (invoice number, date, amounts, line items, ntx.). Qhov kawg, koj export cov nyiaj los rau CSV lossis Excel.
help_step1_desc: Mus rau Settings → API Keys thiab tsiv noj npe koj tus kheej AI key (xws li Google Gemini). Qhov no yog yuav tsum — lub platform tsis muaj nws tus key. Cov nqi yog ua rau koj tus AI account.
help_step2_desc: Mus rau Upload & Extract. Drag lossis xaiv PDF file (txog li 200 invoices rau ib feem) thiab click "Register Documents". Lub system automatic na nrhiav cov invoice thiab supplier.
help_step3_desc: Los ntawm Documents page, xaiv ib lossis ntau cov ntaub ntawv thiab click "Labels". Koj yuav coj mus rau tshiab nplooj qhov chaw koj pom cov invoice hauv sab laug thiab cov cim form hauv sab xis. Txhais cov teb koj xav extraction (xws li invoice number, date, total, VAT) thiab line items. Lossis, tsim ib qho cim los ntawm Labels page → + New Label.
help_step4_desc: Los ntawm Documents page, xaiv cov ntaub ntawv thiab click "Batch". Lub system siv AI mus extraction data raws li txhua qib cim. Cov nyiaj yuav tsum rau documents xiv.
help_step5_desc: Los ntawm Documents page, xaiv cov ntaub ntawv thiab click "Approve". Koj pom cov invoice hauv sab laug thiab extracted data hauv sab xis. Kho cov txhaum thiab click "Approve Invoice". Qhov hau sync hau cov ntaub ntawv thaum koj nqa tes rau cov row.
help_step6_desc: Tom qab pom zoo cov ntaub ntawv, rov qab mus rau Documents page. Xaiv cov ntaub ntawv tau pom zoo thiab click "CSV", "XLSX" lossis "Line Items XLSX" mus export. Yog tsis xaiv dab tsi, tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv tau pom zoo yuav export.
help_tip_text: Cov kauj ruam yog: Upload → Labels → Batch → Approve → Export. Ua ntej tsim cov cim rau txhua hom invoice (xws li DEI, COSMOTE, VODAFONE) tom qab pib cov bulk extraction. Thaum koj tsim ib qho cim, lub system automatic na sib xws cov invoice los ntawm tib lub supplier.
